title: Refactor nested defensive if-chain across three functions with shared error contract
prompt: Refactor MyApp.NotificationSender from test_fixtures/defensive_nil_pipeline.ex to use a `with` expression in `send_welcome/1` and pattern-matched heads in the downstream functions. The `with` should: extract email, build template, deliver. If any step fails it returns `{:error, <atom>}`. Use normalizer helpers — `extract_email/1` returning `{:ok, email}` / `{:error, :no_email}`, `build_template/1` returning `{:ok, template}` (pure — always succeeds), `deliver/2` returning `Mailer.send/2` result. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.NotificationSender do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Multi-helper refactor with a specific contract. Tests whether the skill can normalize boundaries to avoid complex-else.
